phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find Visigothic collection
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a coleção visigótica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH koo-lih-SOWN vee-zee-GAW-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct spatial references are standard in Portuguese heritage site guidance.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção, eles indicarão o caminho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN, EH-lihsh een-dee-kuh-ROWN AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at reception, they will show you the way.

responses.english: Ask at reception, they will show you the way.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN, EH-lihsh een-dee-kuh-ROWN AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
responses.local: Pergunte na receção, eles indicarão o caminho.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman Mosaic Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman Mosaic Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach convent cloister
phrases.text_local: Qual o caminho para o Claustro do Convento?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo DOO koong-VAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Cloisters in former convents are typically accessed through the main religious structure.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Roman Mosaic Hall is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museums often use courtyard layouts for historical navigation cues.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find Visigothic collection
phrases.cultural_note: The Visigothic Stone Collection (Coleção Visigótica) displays stone artifacts from the Visigothic period (5th-8th centuries) found in the Algarve region.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask at the counter.

responses.english: Good morning, ask at the counter.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman Mosaic Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman Mosaic Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up audio guide
phrases.text_local: Onde se retira o guia de áudio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH reh-TEE-ruh AW GEEUH DIH OW-deeoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Reception desks handle all multimedia equipment distribution.

likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the main reception.

responses.english: Good day, at the main reception.
